heading: Provision of food to certain members and dependents not receiving inpatient care in military medical treatment facilities
label: 1078b Provision of food to certain members and dependents not receiving inpatient care in military medical treatment facilities
notes: Amendments2014—Subsec. (a)(2). , substituted “A member or former member” for “A member” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 113–291, § 705(1)Subsec. (a)(2)(C). , substituted “member, former member, or dependent” for “member or dependent”.Pub. L. 113–291, § 705(2)

Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 112–81, div. A, title VII, § 704(c)125 Stat. 1473Dec. 31, 2011“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section] shall take effect on the date that is 90 days after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Dec. 31, 2011
amendments: Amendments2014—Subsec. (a)(2). , substituted “A member or former member” for “A member” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 113–291, § 705(1)Subsec. (a)(2)(C). , substituted “member, former member, or dependent” for “member or dependent”.Pub. L. 113–291, § 705(2)

Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 112–81, div. A, title VII, § 704(c)125 Stat. 1473Dec. 31, 2011“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section] shall take effect on the date that is 90 days after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Dec. 31, 2011

children.text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of Defense, the Secretary may provide food and beverages to an individual described in paragraph (2) at no cost to the individual.

children.label: i
children.text: who is receiving outpatient medical care at a military medical treatment facility; and

children.label: ii
children.text: whom the Secretary determines is unable to purchase food and beverages while at such facility by virtue of receiving such care.

children.label: i
children.text: who is a family member of an infant receiving inpatient medical care at a military medical treatment facility;

children.label: ii
children.text: who provides care to the infant while the infant receives such inpatient medical care; and

children.label: iii
children.text: whom the Secretary determines is unable to purchase food and beverages while at such facility by virtue of providing such care to the infant.

children.label: C
children.text: A member or former member of the uniformed services or dependent whom the Secretary determines is under similar circumstances as a member, former member, or dependent described in subparagraph (A) or (B).

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: b .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall ensure that regulations prescribed under this section are consistent with generally accepted practices in private medical treatment facilities.
